zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空延续
zh.content:
ETH/USD短线呈弱势震荡偏空结构，价格运行在1580均线下方，反弹动能不足，低位整理为主，整体偏弱，短期仍有回踩风险。

MACD为-1.65显示空头动能占优，均线系统压制明显，SMA20位于价格上方形成短期阻力，量能偏弱，需等待确认反弹需突破1580确认趋势反转。

下方支撑关注1575与1560区间，一旦跌破可能测试更低流动性区域，上方阻力1580-1585区间震荡为主需警惕下破加速。

反弹不破1580可逢高轻仓做空，止损1590；若站稳1585上方则短线转多，目标1600附近。控制仓位防止震荡洗盘。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is trading around 1577, slightly below prior SMA20 1580, indicating mild bearish consolidation after recent compression. Price action shows extremely tight 24h range between 1581.52 and 1577.07, reflecting low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The market structure suggests a short-term sideways bias with downward pressure developing as momentum weakens. This environment typically precedes a directional breakout once volume expands.

Momentum indicators remain mixed to bearish. MACD at -1.65184 signals downside momentum dominance, though the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation strength. RSI is unavailable, reducing precision in overbought/oversold assessment. Price trading beneath SMA20 at 1580.44 reinforces short-term weakness, suggesting sellers currently control marginal momentum while buyers lack follow-through strength. This alignment indicates a cautious bias until a clear breakout above resistance emerges.

Immediate support sits near the session low around 1577, with minor risk of breakdown if selling pressure increases. Resistance is first located at the SMA20 level of 1580.44, which currently caps upward attempts. A stronger barrier lies at the 24h high of 1581.52, and sustained rejection here maintains consolidation conditions within a narrow range. Losing the lower boundary would shift bias toward deeper corrective movement.

Trading conditions favor range-based strategies rather than trend following. Long positions are preferable only on a confirmed break and hold above 1581.52, targeting extension toward 1590. Conversely, failure to hold 1577 may justify short exposure toward lower supports. Tight risk management is essential due to compressed volatility, with stop placement just outside range boundaries to avoid whipsaw moves. Overall, price action suggests patience until a clear directional catalyst appears.
